purpose: Defines sensory, meditative and ritual layers for AWARA daily play: sound, visuals, movement, breath, food, cards and AI-generated guidance.

daily_ritual_flow.title: Вход в пространство
daily_ritual_flow.description: The player enters the game and receives the atmosphere of the day before any task appears.

daily_ritual_flow.title: Настройка
daily_ritual_flow.description: The game invites a short pause, breath, body scan or simple meditation.

daily_ritual_flow.title: Тигель
daily_ritual_flow.description: The player writes, speaks or structures the lived experience through feet, heart, head and cooperation.

daily_ritual_flow.title: Ответ Разума Игры
daily_ritual_flow.description: The Oracle returns poetic reflection and machine-readable rewards.

daily_ritual_flow.title: Открытие награды
daily_ritual_flow.description: Cards, light, artifacts, advice and music are revealed as the crystallized result of the day.

daily_ritual_flow.title: Перенос в жизнь
daily_ritual_flow.description: The player receives one simple real-life practice for the next day.

sound.description: Ambient sound, generated music, mantra-like textures, nature sounds and card reveal tones.

visual.description: Backgrounds, particles, colors, card reveal animations, temple/cosmos transformations.

breath.description: Short breath practices connected to daily energy and element balance.

body.description: Embodied prompts for feet, posture, walking, rest, movement and physical grounding.

food_and_ayurveda.description: Gentle advice around food, herbs, warmth, rest and daily energetic balance.

craft_and_materials.description: Real-life bridge into stones, minerals, clay, plants, oils, music and handmade practices.

soul.visual_mood: dark luminous inner space, central spark, four initiation spheres, subtle particles
soul.sound_mood: soft drone, heartbeat, breath, distant bells

earth.visual_mood: Star Temple, Vastu grid, elemental rooms, warm golden earth light
earth.sound_mood: temple ambience, birds, clay, water, hearth, gentle instruments
earth.main_interaction: build spaces from light, complete embodied practices

cosmos.visual_mood: star maps, lokas, planetary links, agent domains, cosmic gates
cosmos.sound_mood: celestial pads, chimes, deep space resonance, mantra winds
cosmos.main_interaction: open lokas, tune planetary links, receive higher cards

divine_game.visual_mood: ornate sacred board, living cards, moving lights, multiplayer ritual field
divine_game.sound_mood: festival ritual music, drums, choir, cosmic orchestration
divine_game.main_interaction: play divine moves, combine cards, create universes

oracle_sensory_output_contract.music_prompt: Prompt for Suno or another music generator based on the day energy.
oracle_sensory_output_contract.visual_prompt: Prompt for daily visual atmosphere or generated image.
oracle_sensory_output_contract.breath_practice: Short breath practice for the player's current state.
oracle_sensory_output_contract.ayurvedic_advice: Simple food/rest/herb advice, not medical diagnosis.
oracle_sensory_output_contract.material_practice: Optional real-life practice with stone, plant, oil, clay, sound or craft.
oracle_sensory_output_contract.real_life_bridge: One action that carries the game into ordinary life.
